recommended.song_name: How Bad Do You Want It

content:
What about now

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
The sign in the window said, "For Sale Or Trade"[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
On the last remaining dinosaur Detroit made[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Seven hundred dollars was a heck of a deal for a[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]                                                                      [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]B5[/ch]
Four hundred horsepower jukebox on wheels [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
And that road rolls out like a welcome mat[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I don't know where it goes but it beats where we're at[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
We always said some day, somehow [/tab]
[ch]B[/ch]                                                                         [ch]B5[/ch]  
[tab][ch]B5[/ch]
We're gonna get away gonna blow this town .....[/tab]

Chorus:
[ch]E[/ch]                                                  [ch]B[/ch]                          
      
What about now? How about tonight?
[tab]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch] 
Baby for once let's don't think twice[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                        [ch]B[/ch]
Let's take that spin that never ends [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
That we've been talking about[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                                        [ch]B[/ch] 
What about now? Why should we wait?[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch]
We can chase these dreams down the interstate[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                                [ch]B[/ch]   
And be long gone 'fore the world moves on [/tab]
           [ch]C#m[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]     (chord optional: [ch]B[/ch])                   
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
And makes another round--What about now?[/tab]


We've been puttin' this off baby long enough
Just give me the word and we'll be kickin' up dust
We both know its just a matter of time
'Til our hearts start racin' for that county line

Chorus

Bridge:                                           
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
We could hang around this town forever makin' plans[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                              [ch]B7[/ch]
But there won't ever be a better time to take this chance[/tab]
